title: koeleria tzvelevii
intro: Koeleria tzvelevii is a type of grass species that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Koeleria tzvelevii include its ability to reduce blood pressure, improve digestion, and act as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Koeleria tzvelevii include infusions and decoctions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, but more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
